## Definition of Done
- [ ] ADR document committed to `docs/adr/` (or `docs/adr/FE/` for frontend)
- [ ] Status set to `Accepted`
- [ ] All questions in Context section are answered
- [ ] Related ADRs listed below
- [ ] Any implementation issues filed as follow-ups
